Source	Half-life	gama-Energy	Intensity(%)	Activity,kBq		Uncertainty(k=2),%
60Co	1925.28 d	1173.228 keV	99.85%		97.6 @2020.11.01 12:00	3.2
			1332.492 keV	99.98%		
137Cs	30.08 y		661.657	 keV	85.1%		9.10 @2020.11.01 12:00	3.6


137Cs:	run708-714
60C0:	run715-721
measure at 2023.5.26 11:00; 两次测量时间差=80866800 s;

A=A0EXP(-λt);
λ=ln2/T_1/2=0.693/T_1/2;

60Co	1925.28 d =166344192 s; λ(60Co)=0.693/166344192=4.166060694e-9; A=97.6e3*exp(-4.166060694e-9*80866800)=69684.75 Bq;

137Cs	30.08 y = 948602880 s; λ(137Cs)=0.693/948602880=7.30548067e-10; A=9.10e3*exp(-7.30548067e-10*80866800)=8577.97  Bq;

single[ChannelID + ModuleID * 16] = E_row * Slope_E[ModuleID][ChannelID];
Slope_E[ModuleID][ChannelID]=cal.txt

Slope_E[i][j]=totalcal*Slope_E[i][j];
原能谱刻度系数：totalcal = 0.582;

根据run708重新刻度

刻度后分辨率：singleInner：σ=2.85860e+01 @662 keV；能量分辨率：10.23%;
GEANT4中对应EventAction.cc中：fEdep[i] = G4RandGauss::shoot(fEdep[i]/keV,0.8*pow(fEdep[i]/keV,0.55));
